meaning: स्पष्ट करने के लिए दो अलग-अलग चीजों के बीच समानता दर्शाना।
definition: To draw an analogy between two different things to explain or clarify.
example: He analogized the brain to a computer to simplify the explanation.

meaning: व्याख्या या स्पष्टीकरण के उद्देश्य से दो चीजों के बीच तुलना।
definition: A comparison between two things to explain or clarify an idea.
example: The analogy between the heart and a pump is useful for teaching biology.

meaning: किसी चीज़ को समझने या स्पष्ट करने के लिए उसका विस्तार से परीक्षण करना।
definition: To examine methodically and in detail the constitution or structure of something.
example: The researcher carefully analyzed the data before drawing any conclusions.

meaning: कुछ ऐसा जो मानक, सामान्य या अपेक्षित चीज़ से अलग हो।
definition: Something that deviates from what is standard, normal, or expected.
example: The anomaly in the data prompted a review of the collection method.

meaning: कोई बात जिसे बिना प्रमाण के सच मान लिया जाए, जो अक्सर किसी तर्क का आधार बनती है।
definition: Something accepted as true without proof, often forming the basis of an argument.
example: The plan was built on the flawed assumption that costs would remain stable.

meaning: समान विशेषताओं के आधार पर चीजों को समूहों में रखना।
definition: To place things into groups based on shared characteristics.
example: The researcher categorized the responses into three broad themes.

meaning: कुछ उत्पन्न करने की क्रिया; कारण और प्रभाव के बीच का संबंध।
definition: The action of causing something; the relationship between cause and effect.
example: Correlation does not imply causation; further study is needed.

meaning: समान गुणों या विशेषताओं के अनुसार व्यवस्थित या संगठित करना।
definition: To arrange a group of things in classes or categories according to shared qualities (replaces the conversational 'group' or 'sort').
example: Scientists classify organisms based on their evolutionary relationships.

meaning: समानताओं और भिन्नताओं को खोजने के लिए दो या दो से अधिक चीजों का परीक्षण करना।
definition: To examine the similarities between two or more things
example: The essay asked students to compare two different political systems.

meaning: दो या दो से अधिक अलग-अलग चीजों को गलत तरीके से मिलाना या भ्रमित करना।
definition: To combine or confuse two or more different things erroneously.
example: It is a mistake to conflate correlation with causation.

meaning: अधूरी जानकारी के आधार पर बनाई गई राय या निष्कर्ष।
definition: An opinion or conclusion formed on the basis of incomplete information.
example: Without more data, the theory remains mere conjecture.

meaning: किसी तर्क या तथ्य को उसकी व्यापक स्थिति या ऐतिहासिक पृष्ठभूमि में रखना।
definition: To place an argument or fact within its broader situational or historical setting.
example: To understand the data, we must contextualize it within the wider economic crisis.

meaning: दो या दो से अधिक चीजों के बीच के अंतर को दर्शाना।
definition: To examine the differences between two or more things
example: The teacher asked students to contrast democracy and dictatorship.

meaning: दो चीजों के बीच पारस्परिक संबंध या जुड़ाव दिखाना।
definition: To have a mutual relationship or connection, in which one thing affects or depends on another (replaces the conversational 'link up' or 'go together').
example: Researchers correlate regular exercise with improved mental health.

meaning: दो या दो से अधिक चीजों के बीच पारस्परिक संबंध या जुड़ाव।
definition: A mutual relationship or connection between two or more things.
example: There is a strong correlation between education levels and income.

meaning: किसी पाठ या अवधारणा की अंतर्निहित मान्यताओं की जांच करके उसका विश्लेषण करना।
definition: To analyze a text or concept by exposing its internal contradictions (replaces the conversational 'take apart').
example: The philosopher deconstructed the concept of 'freedom' to reveal its contradictions.

meaning: सामान्य सिद्धांतों से विशिष्ट तथ्यों तक तर्क करके निष्कर्ष पर पहुँचना।
definition: To arrive at a conclusion by reasoning from general principles to specific cases.
example: Scientists deduce the age of fossils using known decay rates.

meaning: उस तर्क से संबंधित जो सामान्य सिद्धांतों से विशिष्ट निष्कर्षों की ओर बढ़ता है।
definition: Relating to reasoning that moves from general principles to specific conclusions.
example: Deductive reasoning helped him narrow down the most likely explanation.

meaning: किसी चीज़ का सटीक वर्णन या संकेत करना; स्पष्ट रूप से रूपरेखा बनाना।
definition: To describe or portray something precisely (replaces the conversational 'draw' or 'lay out').
example: The report delineates the key risks associated with the policy.

meaning: तर्क-वितर्क के माध्यम से असहमति को सुलझाने की एक विधि।
definition: The art of investigating or discussing the truth of opinions, often through contrasting opposing viewpoints.
example: The dialectic between tradition and innovation drives intellectual progress.

meaning: दो ऐसी चीजों के बीच विभाजन या अंतर जो पूरी तरह से अलग हैं।
definition: A division or contrast between two things that are or are represented as being opposed or entirely different.
example: The false dichotomy between science and religion ignores centuries of coexistence.

meaning: चीजों के बीच के अंतर को पहचानना या उसका वर्णन करना।
definition: To recognize or ascertain what makes someone or something different.
example: Students must differentiate between facts and opinions in the article.

meaning: दो चीजों के बीच अंतर को पहचानना या दिखाना।
definition: To recognize or point out a difference.
example: Students should be able to distinguish between fact and opinion.

meaning: व्याख्या या सावधानीपूर्वक विश्लेषण द्वारा किसी चीज़ को स्पष्ट करना।
definition: To make something clear; to explain.
example: Could you elucidate how you arrived at that conclusion?

meaning: ज्ञान या उसकी प्रामाणिकता की डिग्री से संबंधित।
definition: Relating to knowledge or the degree of its validation.
example: Epistemic humility means recognizing the limits of what we can know.

meaning: किसी चीज़ को ध्यान से और विस्तार से देखना।
definition: To look at something carefully and in detail
example: The students examined the specimen under the microscope.

meaning: ज्ञात डेटा या निष्कर्षों को उस क्षेत्र तक विस्तारित करना जिसका अभी तक प्रत्यक्ष अवलोकन नहीं किया गया है।
definition: To extend known data or conclusions into an area not yet directly observed.
example: From current trends, we can extrapolate future population growth.

meaning: बाहर से आने वाला; जिस चीज़ पर चर्चा की जा रही है, उसमें अंतर्निहित नहीं।
definition: Coming from outside; not inherent in the thing being discussed.
example: Extrinsic factors like funding can influence the outcome of research.

meaning: गलत धारणा या दोषपूर्ण तर्क पर आधारित; भ्रामक।
definition: Based on a mistaken belief or faulty reasoning; misleading.
example: The argument was fallacious because it assumed what it was trying to prove.

meaning: सीमित विशिष्ट मामलों के आधार पर दिया गया व्यापक कथन या निष्कर्ष।
example: Saying all teenagers are irresponsible is an unfair generalization.

meaning: केवल उसके हिस्सों के बजाय पूरी प्रणाली को समझने की विशेषता।
definition: Characterized by comprehension of the whole system rather than just its parts.
example: A holistic analysis considers economic, social, and environmental factors together.

meaning: किसी चीज़ को सही ढंग से पहचानना और नाम देना।
definition: To establish or indicate who or what someone or something is.
example: Can you identify the main theme of the poem?

meaning: किसी चीज़ को स्पष्ट या समझने में आसान बनाना; प्रकाश डालना।
definition: To help to clarify or explain something.
example: This example illuminates the flaw in the original argument.

meaning: कोई निष्कर्ष जो किसी बात से निकाला जा सकता है, यद्यपि स्पष्ट रूप से नहीं कहा गया हो।
definition: The conclusion that can be drawn from something although it is not explicitly stated (replaces the conversational 'logical result' or 'hinted outcome').
example: The implications of the new law for small businesses are significant.

meaning: उस तर्क से संबंधित जो विशिष्ट अवलोकनों से सामान्य निष्कर्षों की ओर बढ़ता है।
definition: Relating to reasoning that moves from specific observations to general conclusions.
example: Inductive reasoning led scientists to propose the germ theory of disease.

meaning: स्पष्ट बयानों के बजाय साक्ष्य और तर्क से निष्कर्ष निकालना।
definition: To deduce or conclude information from evidence and reasoning.
example: From the tone of the letter, one can infer that the writer was frustrated.

meaning: उपलब्ध साक्ष्यों के आधार पर तर्क के माध्यम से पहुँचा गया निष्कर्ष।
definition: The act of deriving logical conclusions from premises known or assumed to be true.
example: The detective made a reasonable inference based on the clues at the scene.

meaning: डेटासेट या तर्क में ज्ञात मानों के बीच अनुमानित मान सम्मिलित करना।
definition: To insert an estimated value between known values in a dataset or argument.
example: The analyst interpolated missing data points to complete the trend line.

meaning: किसी दावे या पाठ की बारीकी से और आलोचनात्मक रूप से पूछताछ या जांच करना।
definition: To question or examine a claim or text closely and critically.
example: We must interrogate the assumptions underlying this policy proposal.

meaning: स्वाभाविक रूप से संबंधित; किसी चीज़ की प्रकृति के लिए आवश्यक और मौलिक।
definition: Belonging naturally to something; existing within rather than being added.
example: Critical thinking is intrinsic to good academic performance.

meaning: तथ्यों को खोजने के लिए एक व्यवस्थित जांच करना।
definition: To carry out a systematic or formal inquiry to discover and examine the facts of an incident, allegation, etc.
example: They investigated the cause of the chemical reaction.

meaning: तुलना या विषमता के लिए दो चीजों को एक साथ रखना।
definition: To place two things side by side for comparison or contrast.
example: The writer juxtaposed poverty and luxury to highlight inequality.

meaning: तर्क में एक त्रुटि जो किसी तर्क को अमान्य या भ्रामक बनाती है।
definition: An error in reasoning that makes an argument invalid or misleading.
example: Claiming that an idea is wrong because it is unpopular is a logical fallacy.

meaning: अर्थ, अभिव्यक्ति या समझ में एक सूक्ष्म अंतर।
definition: A subtle difference in meaning, expression, or sound.
example: Her analysis captured the nuance that simpler reports had missed.

meaning: किसी चीज़ का सामान्य विवरण या रूपरेखा।
definition: A general description or plan giving the essential features of something but not the detail.
example: He outlined the key points of his presentation before speaking.

meaning: किसी विशेष क्षेत्र में सोच का एक विशिष्ट उदाहरण, मॉडल या ढांचा।
definition: A typical example or pattern of something; a model or overarching framework.
example: Einstein's theory of relativity shifted the entire paradigm of physics.

meaning: एक ऐसा कथन जो स्व-विरोधाभासी लगता है लेकिन एक गहरी सच्चाई प्रकट कर सकता है।
definition: A seemingly absurd or self-contradictory statement or proposition that when investigated may prove to be well founded or true.
example: The paradox of choice suggests that more options can lead to less satisfaction.

meaning: पूर्व शर्त के रूप में किसी चीज़ की आवश्यकता होना; पहले से मान लेना।
definition: To require something as a precondition; to assume beforehand.
example: This argument presupposes that all voters are fully informed.

meaning: किसी विषय की गहन और आलोचनात्मक रूप से जांच या परीक्षण करना।
definition: To investigate or examine a subject thoroughly and critically.
example: The journalist probed deeper into the government's financial records.

meaning: तार्किक, समझदारी भरे तरीके से किसी चीज़ के बारे में सोचने की क्रिया।
example: Sound reasoning is the foundation of any persuasive argument.

meaning: विरोधी विचारों या साक्ष्यों को सहमति या एकरूपता में लाना।
definition: To bring opposing ideas or evidence into agreement or consistency.
example: The researcher tried to reconcile contradictory findings from two studies.

meaning: ठोस साक्ष्य के बिना कोई सिद्धांत या राय बनाना।
definition: To form a theory or conjecture about a subject without firm evidence (replaces the conversational 'guess' or 'wonder').
example: Without further data, we can only speculate about the cause.

meaning: एक सुसंगत संपूर्ण रूप में विभिन्न विचारों, सूचनाओं या तर्कों को जोड़ना।
definition: To combine elements from different sources into a coherent whole.
example: Good academic writing synthesizes multiple sources into a unified argument.

meaning: किसी जटिल विचार या तर्क के अर्थ की परतों को समझाना या उनका विश्लेषण करना।
definition: To explain or analyze the layers of meaning in a complex idea or argument.
example: Let us unpack the assumptions embedded in this argument.
